channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Double mattress, 4th May
item.description:
Dumped mattress. Again.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterside Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint Potts bin liner and a bag of household rubbish, 4th May
item.description:
Been dumped there recently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Richborough Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road and car park markings, 4th May
item.description:
Road needs repainting - virtually completely disappeared and the car parking areas are virtually non existent in the wide area of Riverdale Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post knocked down. Hole in pavement, 4th May
item.description:
A car crashed into a lamp post outside 54 Wyatt park road last week and knocked it out of the ground. There is a large hole and significant debris on the pavement which needs to be made safe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyatt Park Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large scooter on foreshore, 4th May
item.description:
Large neon pink scooter on foreshore to left of Ernie's Beach at Gabriel's Wharf, (when facing Thames) trip hazard at low tide/environmental issue Has been there for several weeks, at least 4
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Queen's Walk, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hot spot corner of Church Street and Camberwell Grove, 4th May
item.description:
Really messy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58a, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M&S shopping trolley dumped on side of road, 4th May
item.description:
Been there since yesterday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandway Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken furniture and other stuff left by the bins at brodie house Se1 5hx, 4th May
item.description:
Broken furniture and other rubbish dumped by the bins at brodie house coopers Road Se1 5hx
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brodie Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I need to report waste/faeces outside my front door that needs urgent cleaning, 4th May
item.description:
I’ve reported this issue prior but forgot to give the full address which is 113 Gibbon Road SE15 3XF. There is faeces directly outside my front door at 113 Gibbon Road. I do not have any pets, so this has not come from me. It is located at the entrance and is a hygiene concern affecting access to my home. I would appreciate this being cleaned as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gibbon Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: “I need to report waste/faeces outside my front door that needs urgent cleaning, 4th May
item.description:
There appears to be faeces outside my front door at 113 Gibbon Road. It’s directly outside my entrance and I don’t have any pets, so it hasn’t come from me. It’s a hygiene concern and I would like it removed as soon as possible. I do not have any pets, so this has not come from me. It is located right at the entrance and is a hygiene concern affecting access to my home. I would appreciate this being cleaned as soon as possible. This has been there for the past 4 days now. I noticed it when I stepped out my front door and I saw someone had left it there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gibbon Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barry Rd x Goodrich fly tipping, 4th May
item.description:
Bus shelter northbound on Barry Road near Goodrich Road - cardboard packaging Check for addresses. Also, bed frame on corner of Barry and Goodrich near bus stop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip sofa, 4th May
item.description:
Sofa in bushes with other bags of rubbish
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broadwater Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair/sofa left in bushes near bus stop, 4th May
item.description:
Been there for months.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broadwater Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 4th May
item.description:
Dead animals
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nichol Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive hole in tarmac, 4th May
item.description:
The surface of tarmac in many places in this area are now dangerous this hole is several inches deep and has been reported before but has got much worse as no repairs have been forthcoming This is a serious trip hazard and also a risk to cars

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Park Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping near bus stop bin - bus stop CH (place farm avenue), 4th May
item.description:
This has been a persistent issue of someone leaving the bin bag near the bin resulting in the bag being torn by foxes overnight and trash spread all over the pavement and the houses nearby

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More and more rubbish added, 4th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Launcelot Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray paint on pavement, 4th May
item.description:
Thames Water left spray paint over new paving. Please remove paint and restore paving. (And please ignore previous message : wrong location). Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131-137, Lewisham High Street, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray paint left by Thames Water on new paving, 4th May
item.description:
Please remove spray paint and restore paving
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 120, Lewisham High Street, Ladywell, Lewisham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmacking around trees, 4th May
item.description:
The workmen have tarmacked over the earth around mature trees in the marketplace. They will be starved of water and die. The tarmac needs to be dug up and the earth loosened immediately. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 120, Lewisham High Street, Ladywell, Lewisham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
